# Global Security Community

> Connecting cybersecurity professionals worldwide through local chapters, events, and knowledge sharing.

The Global Security Community (GSC) is a nonprofit platform that brings together cybersecurity professionals through local chapters and in-person events. We foster knowledge sharing, networking, and professional development across the global security community.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://globalsecurity.community/): Upcoming events and community overview
- [About](https://globalsecurity.community/about/): Mission, values, and team information
- [Chapters](https://globalsecurity.community/chapters/): Local community chapters worldwide
- [Events](https://globalsecurity.community/events/): Community events and meetups
- [Contact](https://globalsecurity.community/contact/): Get in touch with the community
- [Privacy Policy](https://globalsecurity.community/privacy/): How we handle your data
- [Terms of Service](https://globalsecurity.community/terms/): Usage terms and conditions

## Community

- Website: https://globalsecurity.community
- GitHub: https://github.com/Global-Security-Community
